---
id: fetch-bot-event
title: "On bot event"
description: "This is triggered when bot event is triggered. E.g., when app is uninstalled from workspace."

hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";

import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"On bot event"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v2/public/slack/on-bot-event"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This is triggered when bot event is triggered. E.g., when app is uninstalled from workspace. 

Heads up! The events have to be configured via Slack App configuration in Event Subscription section.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>
